deep_dive.title: BiDeMem: Bidirectional Degradation Memory for Explainable Image Restoration
deep_dive.abstract: Degradation-aware prompts, conditions, and latent priors are increasingly used in image restoration, yet they are usually judged by a single endpoint: whether the restored image obtains higher PSNR. This is a weak test of semantics. A condition can help by adding capacity, acting as a global correction bias, or exploiting dataset shortcuts, without becoming an interpretable degradation prior. We propose BiDeMem, a bidirectional degradation memory for explainable image restoration. A query built from restoration features and input statistics retrieves a compact top-k subset of memory slots. The same selected slot identity supports the restoration path at inference time and a training-only forward-degradation explanation path. The study centers on verifiability in a controlled multi-degradation NAFNet setting. New controls separate the gain from a correction head alone, a dense query prior, and a static global prior: these variants are 0.2588, 0.2586, and 0.2839 dB below BiRank, respectively. Strong residual supervision and a wider degradation head also remain below the full bidirectional memory model. Intervention probes show that BiRank preserves restoration quality while increasing wrong-prior and native-prior sensitivity, framing degradation memory as both a restoration module and a falsifiable explanation mechanism.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Provides interpretable degradation explanations in image restoration via a bidirectional memory.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 通过双向记忆提供可解释的图像退化解释。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 通过双向记忆提供可解释的图像退化解释。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 通过双向记忆提供可解释的图像退化解释。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes BiDeMem, a memory module that retrieves degradation priors for image restoration and concurrently provides forward degradation explanations during training, enabling interpretable restoration.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 图像复原模型常以退化条件作为辅助，但其可解释性不足。本文提出BiDeMem，一种双向退化记忆模块，它通过查询从复原特征和统计信息中检索退化表示，该退化表示既用于指导复原，又驱动一个前向路径来解释退化过程。在图像去雨等任务上的实验证明，BiDeMem在获得高质量复原的同时，能给出合理的退化解释，为图像质量相关的推理与解释提供了可行方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 图像复原模型常以退化条件作为辅助，但其可解释性不足。本文提出BiDeMem，一种双向退化记忆模块，它通过查询从复原特征和统计信息中检索退化表示，该退化表示既用于指导复原，又驱动一个前向路径来解释退化过程。在图像去雨等任务上的实验证明，BiDeMem在获得高质量复原的同时，能给出合理的退化解释，为图像质量相关的推理与解释提供了可行方案。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: reasoning based perceptual image quality evaluation with explanations

quick_skim.title: ProMSA:Progressive Multimodal Search Agents for Knowledge-Based Visual Question Answering
quick_skim.abstract: Knowledge-based Visual Question Answering (KB-VQA) requires models to combine image understanding with external knowledge. Most prior methods use a fixed retrieve-then-generate pipeline with a pre-selected retriever and a static top-k setting, which is not adaptive during reasoning. We propose ProMSA, a progressive multimodal search agent for KB-VQA. Given an image-question pair, the agent iteratively chooses image search, text search, or stop, under explicit tool-call budgets and with deduplication to avoid redundant retrieval. For training, we first use rejection-sampling SFT to learn valid tool-use formats, then optimize the agent with TN-GSPO, a sequence-level RL objective that normalizes updates by both generation length and tool-interaction depth. Experiments on E-VQA and InfoSeek show consistent gains over strong RAG and agent baselines, and improved retrieval and end-to-end accuracy. The code is available at https://github.com/DingWu1021/Promsa.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Uses reinforcement learning to train progressive multimodal search agents.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用强化学习训练渐进式多模态搜索代理。
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用强化学习训练渐进式多模态搜索代理。
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用强化学习训练渐进式多模态搜索代理。
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes ProMSA, a multimodal search agent for KB-VQA that iteratively retrieves information using RL for adaptive tool-call decisions, outperforming fixed retrieval pipelines.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对知识型视觉问答中固定检索策略缺乏推理适应性的问题，提出ProMSA代理。该代理利用序列级强化学习TN-GSPO优化多模态搜索决策，在预算内逐步选择图像检索、文本检索或停止。实验表明，动态检索优于静态管线，在多个基准上取得领先结果。该方法为多模态推理任务提供了一种新的自适应信息获取方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对知识型视觉问答中固定检索策略缺乏推理适应性的问题，提出ProMSA代理。该代理利用序列级强化学习TN-GSPO优化多模态搜索决策，在预算内逐步选择图像检索、文本检索或停止。实验表明，动态检索优于静态管线，在多个基准上取得领先结果。该方法为多模态推理任务提供了一种新的自适应信息获取方案。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: reinforcement learning for image quality assessment and description
